focus: whether the ex-partner will come back
cardReadingDirection: No — the cards indicate your ex is unlikely to come back, because the foundation of that relationship has already collapsed and the emotional bond is currently one-sided. Card 1 (The Tower) = the breakup exposed real problems in the relationship, so it cannot simply be rebuilt in its old form; any return would require an honest restart, not a continuation. Card 2 (Two of Cups Reversed) = the mutual emotional investment is imbalanced right now — you are giving more than your ex is, which blocks a genuine reunion. Card 3 (The Moon) = the signals you think you are seeing from your ex are unclear or misleading, so do not read hidden meaning into ambiguous messages or social media activity. Practical advice: start a 30-day no-contact period today, stop checking their social media, and write down the real reasons the relationship ended so you can judge clearly whether you actually want them back or just miss the comfort.
